steps.description: If the fibula is from the right leg, tick the "Right side leg" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Specify if fibula is from right leg

ui_parameter_binding.ui_text: (tick if fibula is the one from the right leg)

properties.text: (tick if fibula is the one from the right leg)

sub_operations.question: Is the fibula from the right leg?

choice_info.question: Is the fibula from the right leg?

ui_guidance.title: Is the fibula from the right leg?
ui_guidance.instruction: Tick box if right leg fibula.

steps.description: In the "Select mandibular segmentation" section, choose the mandibular segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Select the mandibular segmentation node
sub_operations.question: Select the mandibular segmentation

ui_guidance.title: Select the mandibular segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose a mandibular segmentation from the list.

steps.description: In the "Select fibula segmentation" section, choose the fibula segmentation.

sub_operations.description: Select the fibula segmentation node
sub_operations.question: Select the fibula segmentation

ui_guidance.title: Select the fibula segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose a fibula segmentation from the list.

steps.description: For the "Current Scalar Volume" option, select the Mandible Volume.

sub_operations.description: Select the mandible scalar volume node
sub_operations.question: Select the Mandible Volume

ui_guidance.title: Select the Mandible Volume
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose a scalar volume for the mandible.

steps.description: Click "Create bone models from segmentations" button.

sub_operations.description: Create bone models from segmentations

steps.description: Change the layout to "Conventional".

sub_operations.description: Change layout to Conventional

steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle on "slice visibility in 3D view".

sub_operations.description: Toggle on slice visibility in 3D for Red view

operation_descriptions: Toggle on slice visibility in 3D for Red view

steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle on "FOV, Spacing match 2D" (adjusts slice resolution to match the 2D viewport pixel spacing).

sub_operations.description: Toggle FOV Spacing match 2D for Red view

operation_descriptions: Toggle FOV Spacing match 2D for Red view

steps.description: In the toolbar, turn on "slice intersection visibility". In the slice intersection interaction options, turn on "set interaction", then enable both "Translate" and "Rotate".

sub_operations.description: Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction with Translate and Rotate

ui_guidance.title: Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction

operation_descriptions: Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction with Translate and Rotate

steps.description: Manually adjust the slice intersection position by translate and rotate of the cross lines in each view.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust slice intersection handles by translating and rotating

ui_guidance.title: Adjust slice intersection
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag cross lines to position and rotate.

steps.description: Click the "Add mandibular curve" button.

sub_operations.description: Add mandibular curve via extension button

steps.description: Configure the display settings of the mandibular curve created by the "Add mandibular curve" button so it is shown in both "View 1" and "Red".

sub_operations.description: Configure mandibular curve display to show in View 1 and Red

ui_guidance.title: Show mandibular curve in View 1 and Red

operation_descriptions: Configure mandibular curve display to show in View 1 and Red

steps.description: Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.

sub_operations.description: Manually draw mandibular curve in Red view

ui_guidance.title: Draw mandibular curve
ui_guidance.instruction: Click to place curve points along the mandible on Red view.

steps.description: Change the layout to "BoneReconstructionPlanner".

sub_operations.description: Switch to BoneReconstructionPlanner custom layout

steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle off "slice visibility in 3D view".

sub_operations.description: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D for Red view

operation_descriptions: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D for Red view

steps.description: Manually set how many cut planes you want.

sub_operations.description: Specify number of mandibular cut planes
sub_operations.question: How many mandibular cut planes do you want?

choice_info.question: How many mandibular cut planes do you want?

steps.description: Click "Add cut plane" button.

sub_operations.description: Add a cut plane via extension button

steps.description: Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane interaction N times. Do not store these planes as a rotation plane; they are mandibular cut planes managed by the extension.

sub_operations.description: Place one mandibular cut plane by clicking in the viewer
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Place this plane, then click Done.

steps.placement_instructions: Place this plane, then click Done.

ui_guidance.title: Place cutting plane
ui_guidance.instruction: Place this cutting plane, then click Done.

steps.description: Click "Add fibula line" button.

sub_operations.description: Add fibula line via extension button

steps.description: Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.

sub_operations.description: Draw fibula line in 3D View 2, distal to proximal

ui_guidance.title: Draw fibula line
ui_guidance.instruction: Place line on fibula in 3D View 2, start distal, end proximal.

steps.description: Click "Center fibula line using fibula model" button to align the line with the anatomical axis of the fibula.

sub_operations.description: Center fibula line using fibula model

steps.description: Tick the "Automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bones contact area" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Enable automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bone contact

ui_parameter_binding.ui_text: Automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bones contact area

properties.text: Automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bones contact area

steps.description: Tick the "Make all mandible planes rotate together" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Enable make all mandible planes rotate together

ui_parameter_binding.ui_text: Make all mandible planes rotate together

properties.text: Make all mandible planes rotate together

steps.description: Click "Update fibula planes over fibula line; update fibula bone pieces and transform them to mandible" to generate the reconstruction and create the fibula cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Generate fibula planes, bone pieces, and transform them to mandible

steps.description: In the BoneReconstructionPlanner module, in the "Mandible planes" row, toggle on the eye-icon tool button to show the mandibular cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Toggle on visibility of mandible planes

steps.description: In the same "Mandible planes" row, toggle on the axes-icon tool button to show the plane interaction handles.

sub_operations.description: Toggle on interaction handles for mandible planes

steps.description: Enter the desired value in "Initial space (mm)".

sub_operations.description: Enter initial space between fibula planes in mm
sub_operations.question: Enter Initial space (mm)

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? (Yes to stop, No to continue)

steps.description: Enter the desired value in "Between space (mm)".

sub_operations.description: Enter additional between space of fibula planes in mm
sub_operations.question: Enter Between space (mm)

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? (Yes to stop, No to continue)

steps.description: Manually adjust the mandibular cut planes in the mandible 3D view by dragging the visible plane interaction handles until the positions and rotations look correct.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust mandibular cut planes by dragging interaction handles

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? (Yes to stop, No to continue)

ui_guidance.title: Adjust cut planes
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag plane handles to position and rotate.

steps.description: Click "Update fibula planes over fibula line; update fibula bone pieces and transform them to mandible" to regenerate the reconstruction. Review the result; if it is not satisfactory, repeat steps 27-30 until the reconstruction is satisfactory.

sub_operations.description: Regenerate reconstruction: update fibula planes, bone pieces, and transform to mandible

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? (Yes to stop, No to continue)

ui_guidance.title: Regenerate reconstruction
ui_guidance.instruction: Click button to update after adjustments.

steps.description: When the reconstruction is satisfactory, in the BoneReconstructionPlanner module's "Mandible planes" row, toggle off the eye-icon tool button to hide the mandibular cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Toggle off visibility of mandible planes

steps.description: Clear the "Show original mandible model" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Clear show original mandible model checkbox

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? (Yes to stop, No to continue)
